source_priority: Find latest annual report, latest quarterly results, earnings call transcript, investor presentation, and official product/capacity pages first.
primary_sources_to_find: annual report / quarterly results / presentation / capacity expansion announcement / product page
metrics_to_verify: AI/HPC advanced packaging revenue; backlog/orders; capacity; substrate layer/spec upgrade; gross margin
upgrade_conditions: Original sources tie orders/revenue to HBM, CoWoS, AI server, advanced package, ABF, or high-speed PCB demand.

counterevidence: 消费/汽车PCB混杂、ASP下行
dependency_path: AI rack/networking → high-layer PCB → ASP/margin upgrade
